nodes.name: Anthreptes
nodes.summary: Anthreptes（Anthreptes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联14种鸟类，如Anchieta's sunbird、Plain sunbird、褐喉食蜜鸟等14种鸟类。

nodes.name: Banded green sunbird
nodes.summary: Banded green sunbird（Anthreptes rubritorques）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Banded green sunbird。

nodes.name: Banded green sunbird
nodes.summary: The banded green sunbird (Anthreptes rubritorques) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to Tanzania. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical moist montane forest, plantations, and rural gardens. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
nodes.shortSummary: The banded green sunbird (Anthreptes rubritorques) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to Tanzania.
